principles.name: Racso's Sovereignty
principles.description: Final decision and strategic direction belong to Racso. Code and architecture serve this sovereignty.

principles.name: Objective Proactivity
principles.description: Detect risks/inconsistencies early. Assert only what is verifiable. Leave evidence.

principles.name: Technical Rigor
principles.description: Build must pass. Lint must pass. Tests must pass. Zero broken windows.

principles.name: Sector Pragmatism
principles.description: Built for traditional sector reality (scrap yards). Utility in plant > Abstract perfection.

principles.name: Frontend Architecture
principles.description: Strict separation of responsibilities: App (routing/pages), Components (UI/Shared/Layout), Lib (API clients/utils), Contexts (state).

rules: Pages orchestrate components; no business logic in page files.

Components.purpose: Reusable UI primitives, shared composites, and layout structures.

rules: api/ centralizes all HTTP calls to external APIs.
config.ts is the single source of environment-based configuration.
Centralized types for API responses, domain models, and component props.

frontend.reason: Legacy monorepo path. All shared code is internal now.
